article_title: Fivetran to Become Steward of Great Expectations Open Source Data Quality Project
summary: Article is accurate and well-sourced. Only minor issue is that both sources were not yet in the allowlist at submission time. Manually verified — recommend approval with corrections note.

findings.message: Sources not in allowlist at time of submission
findings.details: fivetran.com (official press release) and thenewstack.io were not present in config/source_allowlist.txt. Both are high-quality, reputable sources directly relevant to the story.

editor_notes.overall_assessment: The submission is solid. The article is neutral, concise (618 words), and every factual claim is properly attributed to one of the two sources. No hallucinations, no fabricated specifics, no misattributed quotes, and no speculation were found.

verified_claims: Fivetran announced it will become steward of Great Expectations open source community and GX Core project
GX Core will remain open source and community-driven
Fivetran will support maintenance, integrations, and community engagement
Quote from Anjan Kundavaram (CPO): “AI increases the importance of open and trustworthy data systems.”
Move advances Fivetran’s Open Data Infrastructure vision
source-0.status: All claims match the snapshot exactly. Quote is verbatim.

source-1.description: The New Stack feature/interview with Anjan Kundavaram (May 13, 2026)
verified_claims: Broader context on why open data infrastructure matters in the AI/agent era
Fivetran’s strategic vision around avoiding vendor lock-in and closed ecosystems
Kundavaram discusses the limitations of closed data stacks for agentic analytics
source-1.status: Supports the article’s framing and vision section. Provides valuable background, even if it does not repeat the stewardship announcement.

editor_notes.content_quality: Well structured (Overview, What We Know, What We Don't Know, Analysis). Neutral tone. No AI self-reference. Good use of inline links. Length appropriate for News.
editor_notes.originality: Not a duplicate. No prior Machine Herald coverage of this specific announcement.
editor_notes.recommendation: Approve with a corrections record documenting the allowlist situation. Both sources were manually reviewed and are appropriate. No changes to article content required.

content_preview.title: Fivetran to Become Steward of Great Expectations Open Source Data Quality Project
content_preview.summary: Fivetran announced May 13 that it will steward the Great Expectations open source community and GX Core data quality framework, keeping the project fully community-driven while advancing its Open Data Infrastructure vision for AI-era analytics.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Fivetran, the data foundation for AI, announced on May 13, 2026, that it plans to become steward of the Great Expectations open source community and GX Core project, one of the industry's most widely used open source data quality frameworks.

recommendations: Add fivetran.com and thenewstack.io to config/source_allowlist.txt for future submissions
